title: Mixtric Christmas Reindeers and Santa Sleigh Set, Lighted Christmas Yard Decoration, Light up Reindeer Outdoor Decorations with Pre-lit LED Lights for Indoor, Lawn, Outside
features: [STUNNING HOLIDAY DECOR]Transform your space with our illuminated elk and sleigh, crafted entirely from vibrant LED lights. Perfect for enhancing the ambiance of your living room, yard, commercial spaces, office environments, and more

[THE PERFECT CHRISTMAS GIFT] Delight your loved ones with our enchanting lighted reindeer and Santa's sleigh, an excellent choice for Christmas celebrations, weddings, engagements, anniversaries, or festive parties. These charming decorations also make wonderful additions to your Christmas tree, elevating the holiday spirit

[EYE-CATCHING LED ILLUMINATION]Our Christmas reindeer decoration features an easy-to-use power plug for effortless lighting. Enjoy long-lasting illumination that brings a lively and inviting atmosphere to your home or outdoor area, making it a festive focal point

[EASY SETUP – NO ASSEMBLY REQUIRED]Simply unpack your Christmas deer decoration, plug it in, and watch it shine! With its classic warm light and unique vintage design, it effortlessly adds joy and charm to any home or retail space

[SPACIOUS DIMENSIONS] Elk Size: (29 x 6.3 x 39.4)" / (74 x 16 x 100) cm (L x W x H). Sleigh Size: (24.8 x 10.8 x 19.7)" / (63 x 27.4 x 50) cm (L x W x H). Perfectly sized to make a statement without overwhelming your space
description: This charming 3-Piece Lighted Set of 2 Reindeer & Sleigh is the perfect addition to your holiday décor. Featuring two reindeer pulling a santa's sleigh, this set is beautifully adorned with festive bowknots and sparkling glitter, capturing the magic of the holiday season. Features: 1. Charming Reindeer & Sleigh Set: This delightful set features two reindeer pulling a santa's sleigh, each detailed with a festive bowknot and glistening glitter for added holiday sparkle. Loved by both kids and adults, this reindeer and sleigh set is sure to bring warmth and festive joy to your outdoor or indoor Christmas decorations. 2. Eye-Catching LED Lights: Pre-lit with 270 white LEDs, these reindeer glow beautifully in the night, creating an inviting holiday atmosphere. The well-placed LED lights make the reindeer a stunning focal point for your Christmas display, both day and night. 3. Easy Assembly & Storage: This collapsible reindeer set can be set up in minutes, allowing you to enjoy your festive display without hassle. The lights are pre-installed, simply connect the wires and plug them in to watch them come to life. Specifications: 1. Overall Dimensions: (83 x 10.8 x 39.4) in / (211 x 27.5 x 100) cm 2. Number of Lights: 270pcs 3. Light Color: White Package Includes: 1 x 2 Reindeer & Sleigh Set 1 x Set of Ground Stakes
